concerns.text: FR-005 mandates a specific statistical decision tree (Levene's test → ANOVA/Welch's/Welch-James) and specific post-hoc corrections (Tukey/Games-Howell). Tasks T036-T039 implement a different tree (Shapiro-Wilk → ANOVA/Kruskal-Wallis) and use Bonferroni/Dunn's. There is no task to implement the required Levene's test or the Welch-James permutation test, leaving FR-005 unimplemented.

FR-009 requires quantitative matching of repositories based on Lines of Code (LOC) and Cyclomatic Complexity (CC) with ±15% tolerance. Tasks T021a-b only implement a qualitative rubric for documentation quality (Setup/API/Arch sections). There is no task to calculate LOC/CC metrics or implement the matching logic.

FR-008 requires the fallback model to be specifically 'phi-2 (quantized int4)' pinned to a specific HuggingFace commit hash. Task T028 only specifies a generic 'llama-cpp-python' fallback without enforcing the specific model name or commit hash pinning.

FR-010 requires active monitoring of execution time and memory *during* the data analysis pipeline using `time` and `psutil`. Tasks T044a and T045a only verify resource usage in separate post-execution validation scripts, failing to instrument the analysis code itself as required.

SC-002 requires measuring the reduction in 'cognitive load' via clarification questions. Task T016 only logs the questions. There is no task to calculate the derived 'cognitive load proxy' composite score mentioned in the plan's 'Metric Validity' update.
The Edge Case section in spec.md defines a 'Stop-Loss' timeout of 45 minutes. Task T018 sets this timeout to 60 minutes. There is no task to correct this value to match the spec.

The Plan's 'Causal Claim Restriction' and Spec's 'Assumptions' require the 'Human Documentation' condition to be treated as a secondary comparison. Task T042 isolates the pairwise comparison against 'No Documentation' but lacks a task to explicitly include the 'Human Documentation' condition as a secondary comparison.
